content.en:
Blood Demon Monkey!

Ye Tian heard of this for the first time, although his copying talent could probe the talent of creatures and some situations, but this arm was too broken, he naturally couldn't detect any information, and he didn't know about the Blood Demon Monkey.

At this time, Long Shu said: "The Blood Demon Monkey was originally a big clan in this area, and a great battle a long time ago caused the Blood Demon Monkey Clan to collapse and escape, and the Blood Demon Monkey who had seven blood transformations was said to have fallen, and said that he had fled, but the real situation is unknown." The arm you found was the arm of the Blood Demon Monkey of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm, and it was very valuable. "

"How much White Elephant Gold are the White Dragon Clan willing to give?"

Ye Tian asked.

"A million white elephant gold!" Long Shu thought for a moment.

This was indeed much higher than the value of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Golden Turtle Shell Fragments, but by purchasing this arm, the White Dragon Clan was also taking a risk.

After all, the Blood Demon Monkey of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm may not have died, but it is more likely that it has fallen.

Moreover, this arm is not as strong as the turtle shell, and the turtle shell can also be used to refine weapons, but this arm is not good, at most it is used for research and research.

Therefore, the price cannot be calculated proportionally.

"1,000,000 white elephant gold, I agree!"

Ye Tiandao.

Although there may be a higher price to trade to other races, there is no need for it.

The price of the White Dragon Clan is quite fair, and besides, it is just an arm, even if it is a complete corpse, it may not be sold for much outrageous price.

Soon, the transaction was completed, and Long Shu directly gave Ye Tian 1 million white elephant gold.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian went to other dragon clan's shops to buy dragon gold blood, visited all the stores, and finally only purchased 500,000 drops of dragon gold blood.

"500,000 drops of dragon gold blood should be enough for me to break through!"

Ye Tian estimated.

Subsequently.

He continued to retreat and practice, refining the 500,000 drops of dragon gold blood.

However, as he continued to refine, the effect of Dragon Gold Blood became more and more ordinary.

It is conceivable that even if he becomes a Heavenly Ancestor of the Blood Transformation Realm three times, I am afraid that the Dragon Gold Blood will have no effect at all after that.

The years passed.

The 500,000 drops of dragon gold blood became less and less, and Ye Tian's heart became stronger and stronger, and finally when more than 400,000 drops of dragon gold blood were consumed, the heart began to metamorphose for the third time.

Rumble!!!!!

The heart metamorphoses, frantically absorbing the energy of the outside world.

After a long time, the heart metamorphosis was completed, and the immeasurable blood began to change for the third time.

All the time, Ye Tian's strength was skyrocketing.

Finally, the third blood transformation was completely completed.

"I've broken through, and now I'm already a three-time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

With his current strength, he has surpassed the four Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, but he should not have reached the combat power of the five Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, between the four Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors and the five Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

This kind of strength is already very strong, after all, the five Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors are almost all at the level of high-level and elders of the major races.

With his current strength, he even had the hope of escaping from the hands of the Five Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and it was not easy to kill him.

......

As the years passed, the resources of this area of the primeval turtle sea had been exhausted, and many Blood Transformation Realm creatures had left one by one, and they were not ready to continue their search here.

And as the other Blood Transformation Realm creatures left, Ji Heng of the White Shadow Elephant Clan was embarrassed.

They don't know if they want to keep looking, and if they keep looking, they will definitely be suspected.

After all, a boundary-breaking genius like Ji Heng has been staying in such a place, and everyone knows that there is a problem!

Subsequently, the White Shadow Elephant Clan ordered Ji Heng and them to withdraw so as not to arouse the suspicion of other races.

However, the White Shadow Elephant Clan soon performed a very stupid operation.

They did withdraw Ji Heng and the others, but they were still unwilling to give up the Ancient Golden Leaf, so they sent some slightly weaker Blood Transformation Realm creatures to continue searching in this area.

These Blood Transformation Realm creatures are all attached to the White Shadow Elephant Clan, and they don't know what the Ancient Gold Leaf is, and they are ordered to find a treasure and report it immediately if they find something special.

The Blood Transformation Realm creatures that can be found are not white images, and the secrecy work is naturally not done well, and one of the Blood Transformation Realm creatures accidentally said that he leaked his mouth.

"Damn, you shouldn't have asked these vassal races to do things!"

Ji Heng was very annoyed, this matter is becoming more and more unsuccessful, and now that the news has been poked out, even if the outside world does not know that it is the primeval gold leaf, the treasure that can make the White Shadow Elephant clan feel excited is definitely not an ordinary treasure!

All of a sudden, many Blood Transformation Realm creatures ran over.

White Elephant City.

Many Blood Transformation Realm creatures are discussing this matter.

"You say, what is the treasure that makes the White Shadow Elephant clan's heart move?"

"I don't know, but it's certainly precious. "

"I was curious before, what Ji Heng of the White Shadow Elephant Clan was doing there, it seems that he was looking for a mysterious treasure!"

"Could it have been snatched away by the Ancient Demon Ape Clan a long time ago?"

"I don't think so, if it is snatched away by the Ancient Demon Ape, the White Shadow Elephant Clan will not look for it, and it will definitely be still in the Ancient Turtle Sea. "

As these Blood Transformation Realm creatures continued to discuss, Ye Tian also knew the news.

"The Ancient Turtle Sea also has treasures that make the White Shadow Elephant clan excited!!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

Moreover, the White Shadow Elephant Clan doesn't seem to have found it yet, how deeply that treasure has to be hidden!

He was also moved at the moment, so he also went to look for it.

......

The Ancient Sea of Turtles.

At this time, there are more Blood Transformation Realm creatures here, and they are frantically attacking the fragments here.

Thundered!!!!!

A venerable blood transformation realm creature made a move, and the dense fragments truly turned into dust.

As time passed, there were fewer and fewer fragments here, all completely shattered.

I have to say that some treasures are indeed hidden deep and fall into the depths of the fragments, but their value is average, and it is impossible for the White Shadow Elephant clan to find the treasures.

In this way, another long time passed, and all the fragments were shattered, but the mysterious treasure was still not found.

Afterwards.

A news came out that there was no so-called mysterious treasure at the fundamental level, and the news was fake.

There is also news that the treasure has long been transferred by the Ancient Demon Ape Clan or the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan, and it is impossible for it to remain here.

Many of the Blood Transformation Realms believed it, and one by one they left.

As the years passed, there were fewer and fewer Blood Transformation Realm creatures that continued to search, and finally they all gave up.
